name: Baker Hughes Co.
h1: Baker Hughes's GCC footprint in India
lede: Baker Hughes runs three centers across two Indian cities. Bengaluru and Mumbai, covering CoE, built over nineteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Baker Hughes office in India. We map three, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Baker Hughes Co. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Baker Hughes runs 3 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Mumbai), covering CoE. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Baker Hughes's India footprint covers Bengaluru and Mumbai, spanning CoE. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, HR and Procurement for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 31 decision-makers, in one profile.
